use tracing::{info, info_span};

fn process_batch(records: &[Record]) {
    // BAD: info span per item in large batch
    for record in records {
        let span = info_span!("record", id = record.id, name = %record.name);
        let _enter = span.enter();
        info!("processing record");
        // process...
    }
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
